title: John Neslage
compiled_truth: John Neslage is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-09 to 2001-08-30), John Neslage sent 21 and received 702 emails, totalling 723 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (21), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (11), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (8), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (6), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (6).
